name: Moto Edge 30
notes:
1. Run 'fastboot oem get_unlock_data' and submit the output to Motorola's unlock portal at https://motorola-global-portal.custhelp.com/app/standalone/bootloader/unlock-your-device-a.
2. Motorola will email you an unlock key — paste it using 'fastboot oem unlock <key>'.
3. Bootloader unlock WILL wipe all user data — back up first.
4. OrangeFox recovery is not available for this device; use TWRP only.
5. For A/B devices, CyberFlash flashes the inactive slot and then sets it as active.

edl_entry_methods: Method 1 (Key Combo): Power off device. Hold Vol DOWN + connect USB cable.
Method 2 (ADB, if partially booting): adb reboot edl
Method 3 (Last Resort - Test Points): Requires device disassembly. Short EDL test points on motherboard.
IMPORTANT: Motorola EDL requires a signed programmer matching your device's security version.
